---
name: Evidence card review
about: Review whether an evidence card separates findings from interpretation
title: "Evidence card review: "
labels: ["evidence-card-review"]
assignees: []
---

## Card ID

Paste the card ID.

## Source

Link to the source or repo file.

## Review Focus

Check all that apply:

- [ ] The finding sentence includes interpretation.
- [ ] The scope is too broad.
- [ ] The strength grade seems too high.
- [ ] The conflict field is missing or incomplete.
- [ ] The funding / incentive note is missing.
- [ ] The source is not retrievable.
- [ ] Other.

## Evidence

Point to the exact source passage, table, method section, or repo line that supports the review.

## Suggested Revision

Propose a narrower finding sentence, scope note, strength grade, or conflict entry.

## Boundary

Do not use this issue to argue for a preferred theory. Review the card as a source artifact.
